infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Grade.IQ needs access to your camera so you can take photos of your Pokemon cards for AI-powered condition grading. For example, you will photograph the front and back of a card to receive estimated grades from PSA, Beckett, and other grading companies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Grade.IQ needs access to your photo library so you can select existing photos of your Pokemon cards for AI-powered condition grading. For example, you can choose a saved card photo to receive estimated grades and market value estimates.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Grade.IQ does not use your microphone. This permission is requested by the camera module but audio is never recorded.
